review_scope: Bounded baseline review across the current ProductOS reference workspace, scored with explicit provenance and frozen eval inputs.

feature_summaries.gap_summary: Persisted discover outputs now back the promoted decision-package path.
feature_summaries.next_action: Keep the persisted discover package as the standard source for same-day decision scoring and rerun the frozen eval suite after meaningful discover changes.

feature_summaries.gap_summary: Strongest internal alignment slice, but broader promotion is still gated by the remaining truthfulness work.
feature_summaries.next_action: Use the readable-doc bundle internally, but do not let it hide broader truthfulness gaps elsewhere in the control surface.

feature_summaries.feature_name: PRD to deck and executive story
feature_summaries.gap_summary: Persisted story, render, and publish artifacts now back the governed presentation path.
feature_summaries.next_action: Keep the persisted docs-and-deck outputs as the standard communication proof path and refresh them after meaningful product changes.

feature_summaries.gap_summary: Persisted weekly operator outputs now back the supervised autopilot standard.
feature_summaries.next_action: Keep the persisted weekly operator outputs as the standard proof path and reuse them in the release bundle.

feature_summaries.gap_summary: Evidence-backed and strong, but kept internal-use while broader release claims stay in watch mode.
feature_summaries.next_action: Keep the market-intelligence slice active, but do not use it to mask the weaker truthfulness state of the control surface.

feature_summaries.gap_summary: The CLI now reports blocked promotion honestly, but it still stays in watch mode because mixed-provenance control-surface claims remain.
feature_summaries.next_action: Keep the truthful blocked-state control surface in place as the internal-use standard, then reduce the remaining mixed-provenance claims while self-improvement stays the main gating target.

feature_summaries.gap_summary: Strongest promoted slice because parity proof remains explicit and mostly independent of the bundle narrator.
feature_summaries.next_action: Use the verified thin adapter layer as the standard portability contract and apply the same parity proof before adding future hosts.

feature_summaries.gap_summary: Persisted improve-review and release-gate artifacts now back the scoring loop.
feature_summaries.next_action: Keep the persisted improve-review snapshot and release-gate decision as the scoring standard for future baseline refreshes.

highlighted_risks: Broader web and feed coverage can weaken trust unless freshness, ranking, and contradiction review stay explicit.
The next research slice should stay PM-reviewable before new market or strategy claims propagate beyond the repo.
next_action: The bounded baseline gate is cleared. Expand the governed research superpower across market, competitor, and customer signals before broader distribution work resumes.
